zh.lifeSummary: 當Charles Hughes於大約1665年出生在英國威爾斯丹比爾丹比時，他的父親Valentine Hughes31歲，母親Fortune Gwilym29歲。他於1695年與Electa Rebecca Judson在美國賓夕法尼亞州德拉沃拉德諾 堂史普結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1689年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加宾夕法尼亚州威爾許 特拉可特拉德諾 堂史普且於1699年住在英國英格蘭爾切斯特布拉可切斯特 凱德拉爾。他去世於1711年在美國賓夕法尼亞州費拉德爾福亞德拉沃 堂史普享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Charles Hughes于大约1665年出生在英国威尔斯丹比爾丹比时，他的父亲Valentine Hughes31岁，母亲Fortune Gwilym29岁。他于1695年与Electa Rebecca Judson在美国宾夕法尼亚州德拉沃拉德諾 堂史普结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1689年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加宾夕法尼亚州威爾許 特拉可特拉德諾 堂史普且于1699年住在英国英格兰爾切斯特布拉可切斯特 凱德拉爾。他去世于1711年在美国宾夕法尼亚州費拉德爾福亞德拉沃 堂史普享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hughes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Welsh: variant of Hugh with genitival or excrescent -s.
Irish and Scottish: adopted as an equivalent of Gaelic surnames based on the personal name Aodh ‘fire’, for example Ó hAodha, Mac Aodha; see McCoy and compare McHugh .

variants.name: Hugh
meanings: English, Welsh, and Scottish (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Hue, from ancient Germanic Hugo (ultimately derived from hugi- ‘mind, spirit’). This was a very popular name in England after the Norman Conquest, partly due to the reputation of Saint Hugh of Lincoln (1140–1200), who was born in Burgundy and who established the first Carthusian monastery in England.
Scottish and Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic personal name Aodh, a derivative of a Gaelic word meaning ‘fire’. See Hughes .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 邱 and 丘, based on their Hakka pronunciation; see   Qiu   1 and 2.

nameMeanings.name: Charles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Germanic word, karl, meaning ‘free man’, akin to Old English ceorl ‘man’. The name, Latin form Carolus, owed its popularity in medieval Europe to the Frankish leader Charlemagne ( ?742–814 ), who in 800 established himself as Holy Roman Emperor. His name (Latin Carolus Magnus) means ‘Charles the Great’. Carolus—or Karl, the German form—was a common name among Frankish leaders, including Charlemagne's grandfather Charles Martel ( 688–741 ). Charles is the French form. The name occurs occasionally in medieval Britain as Karolus or Carolus; it had a certain vogue in West Yorkshire from the 1400s, particularly among gentry families. The form Charles was chosen by Mary Queen of Scots ( 1542–87 ), who had been brought up in France, for her son, Charles James ( 1566–1625 ), who became King James VI of Scotland and, from 1603 , James I of England. His son and grandson both reigned as King Charles , and the name thus became established in the 17th century both in the Stuart royal house and among English and Scottish supporters of the Stuart monarchy. In the 18th century it was to some extent favoured, along with James , by Jacobites, supporters of the exiled Stuarts, opposed to the Hanoverian monarchy, especially in the Highlands of Scotland. In the 19th century the popularity of the name was further enhanced by romanticization of the story of ‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’, leader of the 1745 rebellion.

en.lifeSummary: When Charles Hughes was born about 1665, in Denbigh, Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Valentine Hughes, was 31 and his mother, Fortune Gwilym, was 29. He married Electa Rebecca Judson in 1695, in Radnor Township, Delaware, Pennsylvania, United States. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He lived in Radnor Township, Welsh Tract, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America in 1689 and Chester Cathedral, Blacon, Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom in 1699. He died in 1711, in Delaware Township, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, United States, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Charles Hughes est né environ 1665, à Denbigh, Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Valentine Hughes, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Fortune Gwilym, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Electa Rebecca Judson en 1695, à Radnor Township, Delaware, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il a vécu à Radnor Township, Welsh Tract, Pennsylvanie, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1689 et à Chester Cathedral, Blacon, Chester, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1699. Il est décédé en 1711, à Delaware Township, Philadelphie, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Charles Hughes um 1665 in Denbigh, Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Valentine Hughes 31 und seine Mutter Fortune Gwilym 29. Er hat 1695 in Radnor Township, Delaware, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten Electa Rebecca Judson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1689 hat er in Radnor Township, Welsh Tract, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America und 1699 in Chester Cathedral, Blacon, Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom gelebt. Er starb 1711 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Delaware Township, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Charles Hughes è nato il circa 1665 nel Denbigh, Denbighshire, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Valentine Hughes, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Fortune Gwilym, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Electa Rebecca Judson nel 1695, nel Radnor Township, Delaware, Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Vissuto a Radnor Township, Welsh Tract, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America nel 1689 e nel Chester Cathedral, Blacon, Chester, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito nel 1699. Morì nel 1711, nel Delaware Township, Filadelfia, Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Charles Hughesが約1665年にイギリスウェールズデンビグhシュアイアデンビグで生まれた時，父Valentine Hughesは31歳，母Fortune Gwilymは29歳であった。1695年にアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州デラワーラドノー トウンシュイップでElecta Rebecca Judsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1689年にはイギリス植民地アメリカペンシルベニア州ウエルッシュ トラクトラドノー トウンシュイップに，1699年にはイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアチェスターブラコンチェスター カスエドラルに住んでいた。彼は1711年にアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州フィラデルフィアデラワー トウンシュイップで47歳で死去した。

ko.Radnor Township, Welsh Tract, Pennsylvan: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 펜실베이니아 주 웰시 트라크트 라드너 타운시프

ko.Chester Cathedral, Blacon, Cheshire, Eng: 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 체스터 블라콘 체스터 캐테드럴
ko.Philadelphia, Delaware, Pennsylvania, Co: 미국 펜실베이니아 주 필라들필아 데로르 타운시프
ko.Radnor Township, Delaware, Pennsylvania,: 미국 펜실베이니아 주 데로르 라드너 타운시프
ko.lifeSummary: Charles Hughes(이)가 대략 1665년 영국 웨일스 덴비그h실르 덴비그h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Valentine Hughes(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Fortune Gwilym(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1695년 미국 펜실베이니아 주 데로르 라드너 타운시프에서 Electa Rebecca Judson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1689년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 펜실베이니아 주 웰시 트라크트 라드너 타운시프에서, 1699년도에 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 체스터 블라콘 체스터 캐테드럴에서 살았다. 그는 1711년 미국 펜실베이니아 주 필라들필아 데로르 타운시프에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Charles Hughes nasceu aproximadamente 1665, em Denbigh, Denbighshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Valentine Hughes, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Fortune Gwilym, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Electa Rebecca Judson em 1695, em Radnor Township, Delaware, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele viveu em Radnor Township, Welsh Tract, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America em 1689 e em Chester Cathedral, Blacon, Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1699. Ele faleceu em 1711, em Delaware Township, Filadélfia, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Charles Hughes родился около 1665 г. в местности денбаи, денбаишир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Valentine Hughes было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Fortune Gwilym, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Electa Rebecca Judson в 1695 г. в местности раднор тоуншип, делавар, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он жил в местности раднор тоуншип, велш тракт, Пенсильвания, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1689 году и в местности честир кэтедраль, блакон, честир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в 1699 году. Он умер в 1711 г. в местности делавар тоуншип, филаделфя, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Charles Hughes nació aproximadamente 1665, en Denbigh, Denbighshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Valentine Hughes, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Fortune Gwilym, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Electa Rebecca Judson en 1695, en Radnor Township, Delaware, Pensilvania, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Vivió en Radnor Township, Welsh Tract, Pensilvania, British Colonial America en 1689 y en Chester Cathedral, Blacon, Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 1699. Murió en 1711, en Delaware Township, Filadelfia, Pensilvania, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 47 años.
